label: CRT overlay
summary: Scanlines and a vignette, with an optional (off-by-default) flicker.
era: The look of a page seen through a tube monitor at 2 a.m.

options.name: flicker
options.note: capped at 2 changes/sec, tiny opacity delta; force-disabled under reduced motion

a11y: Decoration: aria-hidden, pointer-events:none. Flicker stays far below the photosensitivity threshold and never runs under prefers-reduced-motion.
